llm_raw.description: A payment gateway solution powered by NMI providing merchant services, payment processing, and transaction management.
llm_raw.notes: Paygent acts as a white-label interface for NMI; integration typically requires a merchant account and access to NMI's broad transaction and vaulting APIs.
